items.evidence: Contract markdown and JSON define stage_code, stage_name, final_status_target, and stage_type=concept_contract_only.
Contract defines 小教智能体 / Xiaojiao Agent as the product identity.
Contract requires new teacher-facing copy to use 小教 and forbids blind repository rename.
Contract marks 小备 / Xiaobei / xiaobei as legacy internal namespace without forcing old package rename.
Contract limits Jarvis to internal planning metaphor and forbids teacher-facing Jarvis copy.
Unified Xiaojiao Agent, Agent-led Progressive Workspace, Dynamic Work Panel, Work Object, Work Action, and Work State are defined in English and Chinese.
Work View Composer / 工作视图组合器 and Assistant Surface / 小教交互表层 are defined.
collapsed, suggestion_bar, mini_chat_overlay, and work_record_drawer are required states.
Contract defines all stable Dynamic Work Panel envelope fields.
empty, intake, draft, working, and review modes are defined.
Work Object minimum fields are defined.
Work Action types and minimum fields are defined.
Work State minimum fields and incremental-turn principle are defined.
Contract positions teaching planning as teacher daily workbench / teacher home focused on pre-class professional work.
Contract includes teacher role profile through classroom preparation package chain.
Contract states 周工作图谱 does not replace 学期周历表 / semester_weekly_calendar.
Contract lists required Today Work Item types and minimum fields.
Contract separates Xiaojiao pre-class work from QuickClass classroom execution and learning analytics.
Contract defines 24 prohibited patterns, exceeding the minimum of 20.
Contract includes 1000B, 1000C, 1000D, and 1000E milestones.
1000A creates documentation/schema/audit package only; no frontend files are part of this package.
No runtime files are included; runtime_change_allowed=false.
provider_call_allowed=false and provider_called=false.
database_write_allowed=false and database_written=false.
memory_write_allowed=false and memory_written=false.
feishu_write_allowed=false and feishu_written=false.
formal_export_allowed=false and formal_export_created=false.
classroom_student_runtime_allowed=false and classroom_student_runtime_connected=false.
full_repo_blind_rename_allowed=false and full_repo_blind_rename_performed=false.
Validator checks manifest_minus_zip=[] and zip_minus_manifest=[].
